creator: astrotechdroidmrusli@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Joseph Mingrone from comment #1)
Hi

I have the updated version of Chromium browser. Version 84.0.4147.135. Without any extensions add ons or customization. 

Running virtual box on my apple mac mini. 

And still having issues reading emails with yahoo mail. It does not want to load the emails to view and it keeps loading and loading without giving any signs to read the email from yahoo. I did not have any issues with Firefox browser. Only with Chromium browser running on freebsd 12.1.
